homepage.hero.subtitle.message: 1.3s Ultra-Low Latency · Dual-Channel Output · No GPU Required · Real-Time Voice Cloning

homepage.hero.subtitle2.message: Break the language barrier in live streaming and business

homepage.scenario.content.desc.message: Real-time translation of Chinese content with AI dubbing output, supporting 10+ languages. Dual-channel simultaneous output — never miss a trending moment.

homepage.scenario.meeting.desc.message: Dual-channel real-time bidirectional translation: Channel A Chinese→English, Channel B English→Chinese, running simultaneously without interference. Works with Zoom / Tencent Meeting / OBS.

homepage.scenario.live.desc.message: You speak Chinese, your audience hears their native language in real time — first-audio latency just 1.3 seconds. Voice cloning lets you speak foreign languages in your own voice.

homepage.scenarios.subtitle.message: Whether content creation, live commerce, or business meetings — LinkTalk delivers professional real-time translation

homepage.feature.speed.desc.message: First-audio latency just 1.3 seconds, close to human interpreter level

homepage.feature.voice.desc.message: Real-time voice cloning — speak foreign languages in your own voice

homepage.feature.dual.desc.message: Two independent translation streams running simultaneously without interference

homepage.feature.cost.desc.message: Official API integration, pay per use, free credits for new users

homepage.feature.nogpu.desc.message: Pure CPU operation — runs on any ordinary computer

homepage.feature.multilang.desc.message: Supports Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, French, German, Spanish and 10+ more

homepage.feature.integrate.desc.message: Works with OBS, Zoom, Tencent Meeting and other major platforms
